action.reasoning: Observation: exprate stuck ~0.07 (best 0.0717 from iter9); debug preds show partial structure (frac/sqrt/eq) but symbol/sub/superscript errors, incomplete nums, overgeneration; last runs hit truncation in model.py (incomplete generate/EOS) + train.py (incomplete load/loop/save/metrics/scheduler) + deprecated scheduler arg. Loss curves decline steadily to ~1.0. Analysis: ResNet50 spatial features + Bahdanau attention + aspect-pad(256x1664) + aug is valid baseline (learns basics); bugs from incremental truncation, loss shift, generate (no per-sample EOS stop/exclude sos/eos), scheduler API are root causes limiting exact match rate. Debug confirms model outputs plausible but inaccurate LaTeX. Decision: Supply fully complete non-truncated model.py (all classes + MathExprRecognizer wrapper + fixed per-sample EOS-stopping generate excluding sos/eos + consistent inits), complete train.py (remove verbose, aligned CE on targets[:,1:], grad_clip, full per-batch/epoch jsonl logging, resume best.pt, 20 epochs, bs=12, AdamW+plateau on val_exprate, aug+label_smooth); minor predict/debug updates for robustness/map_location. Run full train+debug (fits in ~1h remaining), then submit_eval on best.pt to exceed 0.08 exprate.
